ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #6, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Feb-10-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kevin Lachona for (petitioner/trustee) Andrea Leung.

The Court asked for any additional information regarding the investments. Mr. Lachona reported that on December 1, 2015 they filed the portfolio, that the investments are well diversified, that it accounts for 80% of the assets, that they are paying a 1.35% investment fee, that this is prudent for the modest amount in the special needs trust, that they want to further invest in this portfolio and that regarding the prior investment in ETF's, they felt if fell under 2574 and that they thought the court was in agreement with it. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Mayo. (Not Reported)

Mr. Shu reported that they have not received the accounting from their client yet, that it is in progress but still being worked on and that they need an additional 30 days to file it. The status on filing an accounting was continued to November 10, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT
Off Calendar Jan-28-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was called with case number 286191 (Conservatorship of Nancy A. Seela).

Appearances: Arthur Park for Andrea Leung.

Mr. Park stated that all but two of the investments were appropriate, that the leverage investments were made in August of 2008, that the Advisor was discharged immediately and that the investments were coming back. In addition, he stated that a Conservator of the Person and the Estate is appropriate, that one alternative is to have an Advanced Health Care Directive by appointment of Counsel, and a capacity examination to see if Ms. Seela could execute a Health Care Directive which may be better for economy sake. The matters were taken under submission.

Judge Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
